com.mentor.chs.api.query

Interface IXQueryFactory


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXQueryFactory

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass, java.lang.String entityHTMLName, IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
      create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.
      IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass, java.lang.String entityHTMLName, java.lang.String filterExpName)
      create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.
      IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass, java.lang.String entityHTMLName, java.lang.String cofClassName, IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
      create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.

    • Method Detail

      • createQuery

        IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass,
                    java.lang.String entityHTMLName,
                    java.lang.String filterExpName)
             throws java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.
        Parameters:
        xClass - -- extensibilty object class
        entityHTMLName - -- extensibilty object name
        filterExpName - -- system filter expression name already available as system data in capital project.
        Returns:
        query, not null if successfully created
        Throws:
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException - -- thrown when the entity being queried cannot be found

      • createQuery

        IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass,
                    java.lang.String entityHTMLName,
                    IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
             throws java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.
        Parameters:
        xClass - -- extensibilty object class
        entityHTMLName - -- extensibilty object name
        filterExpression - -- expression implementing the interface IXFilterExpression
        Returns:
        query, not null if successfully created
        Throws:
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException - t-- hrown when the entity being queried cannot be found

      • createQuery

        IXQuery createQuery(java.lang.Class<? extends IXObject> xClass,
                    java.lang.String entityHTMLName,
                    java.lang.String cofClassName,
                    IXFilterExpression filterExpression)
             throws java.lang.NoSuchFieldException
        create query by providing xClass and html names of objects to query on and filter expression names that (query expression names) objects need to satisfy.
        Parameters:
        xClass - -- extensibilty object class
        entityHTMLName - -- extensibilty object name
        cofClassName - -- Is the filter used to get the objects of a particular cof type. For example from IXConnector get only the PlugConnector.
        filterExpression - -- expression implementing the interface IXFilterExpression
        Returns:
        query, not null if successfully created
        Throws:
        java.lang.NoSuchFieldException - t-- hrown when the entity being queried cannot be found
